{{Quote|A few years ago, I was part of a small secret, expedition to the planet Asation, the doorway to the Gree Enclave. An attempt to acquire an abandoned Gree artifact failed, but I managed to leave the world with mind and body intact, unlike most of the expedition—the Gree are very proprietary.|[[Henrietya Antilles]]|<ref name="FFCA">{{JournalCite|14|From the Files of Corellia Antilles}}</ref>}}
'''Asation''' was the major [[Spaceport/Legends|port]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] and was home to the [[Crafter]] caste of the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]].

==Description==
Travel around the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] started at this world through the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] known as the ''[[Rokak'k Baran]]''. It was a wet high pressure world covered with slimy wetlands. It is believed that the Gree themselves [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] the planet long ago by introducing [[Bioengineering/Legends|genetically altered]] [[Species/Legends|lifeforms]] to populate its surface. Those Gree born on this world tended to be shorter than those born on [[Gree/Legends|Gree]] itself. The average [[Standard day/Legends|day]] lasted 18 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] on Asation encompassed 380 local days.

==History==
{{Quote|The planet's been overrun by nasty things I don't even have a name for. They're all coming out of this portal the Gree call a hypergate.|[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Cobus]]|<ref name="TOR" />}}
[[File:Grand_Hypergate_on_Asation.jpg|thumb|left|A Grand Hypergate on Asation]]
At some point during the [[Galactic War]], the [[Dread Masters]] activated a Gree [[hypergate]] and [[Raid on Asation|released]] a creature known as the [[Lotek'k|Terror From Beyond]].<ref name="TOR" />

During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] was spotted on this planet.<ref name="Holonet" />

During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], [[Consul-General]] [[Skalus]] officially ruled the Gree Enclave from Asation but in practice the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] let the Gree rule their worlds. A sole [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] orbited Asation to give impression of an Imperial presence.<ref name="TGE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The appearance of Asation for the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' was designed by the art team headed by lead artist [[Andrew Collins]].<ref name="ArtStation">{{ArtStation|username=acollins|url=artwork/l6laG|name=[[Andrew Collins]]|text=SWTOR Interiors}}</ref><ref name="ArtStation 2">{{ArtStation|username=acollins|url=artwork/zmn9w|name=[[Andrew Collins]]|text=SWTOR Planets}}</ref>
